title: Metabolomics Analysis of Third Instar Wandering Larvae
author: Wen Aw
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rtad6ie

steps.title: Female third instar wandering larvae were...
steps.instruction: Female third instar wandering larvae were weighed, and methanol was added to make up each sample to 20 mg/ ml.

steps.title: Metabolites were extracted using an ultrasonic...
steps.instruction: Metabolites were extracted using an ultrasonic probe (30 s), 1 h incubation at 4° C and then centrifugation to remove particulates

steps.title: 100 µl aliquots of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: 100 µl aliquots of the supernatant were derivatised [200] before mass spectrometric interrogation with an Agilent GC/MSD system (Agilent Technologies, CA, USA) controlled by Chemstation software.

steps.title: The GC inlet temperature was set to 230° C
steps.instruction: The GC inlet temperature was set to 230° C. 1.0 µl of derivatised sample was injected in splitless mode, using helium as a carrier gas at constant-flow of 1.0 ml/ min.

steps.title: Chromatographic separation was performed on a...
steps.instruction: Chromatographic separation was performed on a 30 m SH-RXi-5Sil MS column (Shimadzu, NSW, Australia) with 0.25 mm internal diameter and 0.25 µm film thickness.

steps.title: The oven temperature was programmed at...
steps.instruction: The oven temperature was programmed at 70° C for 2 min, then ramped at 15° C/ min to 320° C, and held 8 min.

steps.title: Electron ionisation mass spectra were recorded at 1
steps.instruction: Electron ionisation mass spectra were recorded at 1.4 scans/ s over the range m/z 50–700. The MSD auxiliary temperature, source temperature, and quadrupole temperature were set to 280° C, 230° C, and 150° C, respectively.

steps.title: Analytes were identified using the NIST 2011-Wiley Mass Spectra Library
steps.instruction: Analytes were identified using the NIST 2011-Wiley Mass Spectra Library. GC peaks containing mass spectra with a match quality (spectral purity) of more than 70% were considered to be tentatively identified.

steps.title: No internal standard was employed
steps.instruction: No internal standard was employed. Normalisation was performed by maintaining a constant sample mass per volume.

steps.title: Peak areas were log-transformed and statistical...
steps.instruction: Peak areas were log-transformed and statistical analysis used the limma package. Benjamini-Hochberg’s correction was used to control the FDR.
